session_1.speaker: A
session_1.text: I joined a book club last week.

session_1.speaker: B
session_1.text: Nice! What book are you reading?

session_1.speaker: A
session_1.text: We are reading The Great Gatsby. I love it.

session_1.speaker: B
session_1.text: I read that in 2022. Who is your favorite character?

session_1.speaker: A
session_1.text: I like Nick. He is the narrator.
